name: audio
description: Multi-route game audio asset pipeline for Claude/Codex skill runtimes. Generates music, human voice, and game sound effects through local Stability Matrix ComfyUI workflows, validates audio, and writes manifests for Godot projects.

audio-pipeline.instructions: Use this server when a game workflow needs generated music, dialogue voice lines, narration, ambience, stingers, UI sound effects, or creature sounds. First create or read an audio bible/style profile, then write audio_request.json. Set asset pipeline explicitly when needed: ace_step for BGM/music, qwen_tts for human voice, mmaudio for SFX/ambience/monster sounds. Call doctor to check Stability Matrix ComfyUI, requested pipeline nodes, and model files. Only call generate_audio_pack when doctor is ready. Then call validate_audio_pack and record_listening_review. Only integrate assets that pass validation and listening review. Generated audio must be written under the active project, not under the plugin.
